title: Mangyu temple complex
tagline: Mangyu temple complex — spiritual town of Ladakh (UT)

overview.short: The Mangyu temple complex located in the village of Mangyu, Ladakh is one of the earliest in Ladakh, India.
overview.description: The Mangyu temple complex located in the village of Mangyu, Ladakh is one of the earliest in Ladakh, India. Believed to be contemporaneous to the temples at Alchi Monastery and Sumda Chun, the earliest structures are supposed to be dating to the late 12th/early 13th century but as per the oral history and local belief the temples were established by Lotsawa Rinchen Zangpo. Main temple complex comprise two early temples (Sakyamuni and Vairocana temples) situated adjacent to each other and two chapels, one each on either side of the temples, that house large images of two armed and four armed Ma

topPlaces.name: Giramangu
topPlaces.description: Giramangu, also known as Gaira Mangue or Mangyu, is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located in the Likir tehsil.

topPlaces.name: Rizong Monastery
topPlaces.description: Rizong (or Rhizong) gompa, Gelugpa or Yellow Hat Buddhist monastery, also called the Yuma Changchubling, is in Ladakh, India. It is situated at the top of a rocky side valley on the north side of the Indus, to the west of Alchi on the way to Lamayuru.

topPlaces.name: Saspol Caves
topPlaces.description: Saspol Caves (a.k.a. Gon-Nila-Phuk Cave Temples) are situated in the hills behind Suspol, Ladakh, India, which is about 76 km from the city centre of Leh.

topPlaces.name: Hemis Shukpachan
topPlaces.description: Hemis-Shukpachan or Hemishok Pachan is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located on the right side bank of Indus River and is in the Likir tehsil.

topPlaces.name: Alchi
topPlaces.description: Alchi is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located in the Likir tehsil, on the banks of the Indus River 70 km (43.49miles) downstream from the capital Leh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mangyu temple complex?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mangyu temple complex is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mangyu temple complex?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport, Leh (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (239 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mangyu temple complex?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mangyu temple complex at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mangyu temple complex?
faq.a: Stays in Mangyu temple complex start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mangyu temple complex?
faq.a: The top attractions are Giramangu, Rizong Monastery, Saspol Caves, Hemis Shukpachan, Alchi.
